subject: A massive quadruped beast with two forward-curving horns and heavily armored spiny hide stands on a grassy rise against a stormy sky
description: A large, stocky quadruped creature dominates the center of the frame, facing toward the viewer at a slight angle. It has two prominent forward-curving horns, a broad heavily textured hide covered in spines and spots, and a low powerful build reminiscent of a rhino crossed with an alien megafauna. The creature stands on a grassy hill. The sky behind it is stormy and dark with deep gray-blue clouds and vivid red-orange smears near the horizon, suggesting distant fires or a dramatic sunset. Scattered flying creatures or debris is visible in the upper background. The overall mood is ominous and wild.
foreground: Massive horned quadruped beast on grassy hill
background: Stormy dark sky with red-orange horizon and distant flying shapes
emotion: aggressive, territorial — beast facing forward in a dominant posture
